title: Draft Blog Feature Usage Guide
description: Create comprehensive documentation guiding users on how to use the new blog app feature, including admin CRUD operations and client-side fetching with TanStack Query.
details:
Write a new markdown file (e.g., docs/blog-feature-guide.md) that covers:
- Overview of the blog app feature
- How to access and use the admin dashboard for CRUD operations
- Steps to perform create, read, update, and delete actions
- How TanStack Query is used for client-side data fetching
- Screenshots or code snippets where helpful
Ensure the guide is clear, concise, and suitable for both new and experienced contributors.
test_strategy: Review the documentation for completeness, clarity, and accuracy. Ask a team member unfamiliar with the feature to follow the guide and provide feedback. Ensure all steps are reproducible.

title: Integrate Documentation into Main Docs Navigation
description: Add the new blog feature usage guide to the main documentation index or sidebar for discoverability.
details: Update the main README.md or documentation index (e.g., docs/README.md or docs/sidebar.md) to include a link to the new blog feature usage guide. Ensure the link is correctly formatted and appears in a logical location within the documentation structure.
test_strategy: Verify that the new guide appears in the documentation navigation and that the link works as expected. Confirm with a fresh clone that the guide is discoverable.

title: Document API Endpoints and Example Requests
description: Provide detailed API documentation for the blog feature, including endpoint descriptions, request/response formats, and example curl commands.
details:
In the blog feature guide or a dedicated API reference section, list all relevant API endpoints for the blog CRUD operations. For each endpoint, document:
- HTTP method and path
- Required authentication (JWT)
- Request parameters and body
- Example request and response payloads
- Example curl commands for each operation
Highlight any error cases or special considerations.
test_strategy: Test each documented API example to ensure accuracy. Use curl or Postman to verify that the requests and responses match the documentation. Peer review for technical correctness.
